Name: N1 Bela-Bela Expansion – Phase 1 Earthworks & Drainage Complete
Description: Proof-of-work milestone token for completion of Phase 1 earthworks and storm drainage for the N1 Bela-Bela expansion (34 km, 4-lane to 6-lane upgrade). Certified by SANRAL resident engineer and independent PSP (ARUP). Contract SA-N1-BB-2023.

Name: N1 Bela-Bela Expansion – Phase 2 Base Layer Compaction Complete
Description: Milestone token for G1 crushed stone base layer compaction for 34 km N1 Bela-Bela expansion. All MDD ≥ 98% CBR ≥ 80% test results pass. Certified by SANRAL engineer and SANAS accredited laboratory. Contract SA-N1-BB-2023.

Name: N1 Bela-Bela Expansion – Phase 3 Asphalt Surfacing Complete
Description: Milestone token for 80 mm asphalt concrete wearing course on 34 km N1 Bela-Bela expansion. Marshall stability, core extraction and skid resistance tests pass. Certified by SANRAL PSP and independent roller operator.

Name: N2 Wild Coast Toll Road – Msikaba Bridge Delivery Certificate
Description: Delivery certificate for the Msikaba Bridge (a cable-stayed bridge, 580 m main span, 254 m above the Msikaba River). Structural completion and load testing certified by SANRAL, GIBB Consulting and independent inspection engineers. Landmark infrastructure for the Eastern Cape.

Name: N2 Wild Coast Toll Road – Mtentu Bridge Delivery Certificate
Description: Delivery certificate for the Mtentu Bridge (cable-stayed, 791 m main span, 223 m above the Mtentu River gorge). The longest bridge in Africa upon completion. Certified by SANRAL and international inspection panel. Eastern Cape.

Name: N1 Johannesburg–Pretoria Freeway – Annual Pavement Condition Index Certificate 2024
Description: Annual PCI inspection certificate for 62 km N1 Johannesburg–Pretoria Freeway (southbound and northbound carriageways). PCI 78/100. Inspected by SANRAL in-house team and CSIR. High-risk sections identified for 2025 resurfacing programme.

Name: N3 Durban–Johannesburg Corridor – Bridge Structural Inspection Certificate 2024
Description: Biennial structural inspection certificate for 142 bridges on the N3 Durban–Johannesburg Corridor. 138 bridges pass; 4 flagged for priority repairs (deck cracking, bearing deterioration). Inspected by SANRAL Bridge Inspection Unit and Parsons.

Name: N2 Eastern Cape – Emergency Pothole Patching Programme Q3 2024
Description: Emergency pothole patching completion certificate for 820 km N2 Eastern Cape. 28,000 m² of hotmix patching completed. Prioritised ahead of 2024 Festive Season. Certified by SANRAL Eastern Region engineer.

Name: N14 Krugersdorp–Pretoria Upgrade – Interchange Foundation Works Complete
Description: Milestone for foundation piling and pile caps (3 interchange structures) on N14 Krugersdorp–Pretoria upgrade. 120 bored piles completed; load tests 100% pass. Certified by SANRAL Gauteng regional engineer. Contract SA-N14-KP-2024.

Name: N4 Maputo Corridor – Annual Reseal Programme Certificate 2024 (64 km)
Description: Annual reseal programme completion certificate for 64 km N4 Maputo Corridor (Nelspruit–Mozambique border). Double chip-and-spray reseal, crack treatment and guardrail replacement. Certified by SANRAL and Trans African Concessions.

Name: N2 Wild Coast Toll Road – Section 1 (16 km) Road Delivery Certificate
Description: Delivery certificate for Section 1 of the N2 Wild Coast Toll Road (16 km, Lusikisiki to Msikaba River). Full pavement layers, drainage, signage and road furniture. Certified by SANRAL and independent completion engineer. EC.

Name: R61 Northern Cape – Annual Road Safety Audit Certificate 2024
Description: Annual road safety audit certificate for 480 km R61 Northern Cape (De Aar to Beaufort West). Audited per COTO SA Road Safety Audit guidelines. 14 high-risk locations, speed calming and rumble strip recommendations issued. Valid 2025.

Name: N2 Wild Coast – Mtentu Approach Viaduct East Segment Launch Complete
Description: Milestone token for successful incremental launch of 180 m east approach viaduct, Mtentu Bridge. Completed under extremely challenging gorge conditions. Certified by SANRAL, Aurecon bridge designer and specialist inspectors.

Name: N1 Western Cape – Pavement Reseal Programme 2024 (88 km)
Description: Annual pavement reseal completion certificate for 88 km N1 Western Cape (Paarl to Huguenot Tunnel). Slurry seal (48 km) and double chip-and-spray (40 km). Completed 6 weeks ahead of schedule. Certified by SANRAL Western Region.

Name: N3 KwaZulu-Natal – Post-July 2021 Flood Recovery Inspection Certificate
Description: Post-flood damage assessment and recovery inspection certificate for N3 KwaZulu-Natal affected sections (84 km). All 18 temporary diversions removed; permanent repairs certified complete. Issued by SANRAL and National Disaster Management Centre.

Name: R573 Moloto Road Safety Upgrade – Intersection Geometry Improvements (Phase 1)
Description: Milestone for Phase 1 intersection geometry improvements (10 priority intersections) on the R573 Moloto Road, Limpopo/Mpumalanga. Dedicated turning lanes, raised medians and rumble strips installed. Certified by SANRAL and Road Safety Council.

Name: N2 Wild Coast Toll Road – Section 2 (12 km) Road Delivery Certificate
Description: Delivery certificate for Section 2 of N2 Wild Coast Toll Road (12 km, Msikaba to Mtentu). Includes 2 viaducts, 6 retaining walls and 4.2 km of twin-tube road tunnel. Certified by SANRAL and independent engineer (WSP). Eastern Cape.

Name: N4 Bakwena Highway – Automated Tolling Gantry Installation Complete
Description: Milestone for free-flow automated tolling gantry system installation (8 gantries, ANPR + transponder readers) on N4 Bakwena Highway. FAT completed; 97% read accuracy confirmed. Certified by SANRAL and Kapsch TrafficCom.

Name: N7 Western Cape – Guardrail Replacement & Road Marking Programme 2024
Description: Annual guardrail replacement (6.2 km W-beam) and thermoplastic road marking renewal for 340 km N7 Western Cape. All work certified by SANRAL Western Region and Atkins Consulting PSP. December 2024.

Name: GFIP Gauteng Freeway Network – Annual Pavement & Drainage Inspection Certificate 2025
Description: Annual pavement and drainage inspection certificate for 185 km GFIP (Gauteng Freeway Improvement Project) network. PCI average 81/100 (Very Good). 14 drainage blockages cleared. Certified by SANRAL and GIBB Africa. Valid 2026.

Name: R24 OR Tambo Airport Access – Widening Earthworks & Retaining Walls Complete
Description: Milestone for earthworks and precast concrete retaining walls (420 m, max 8 m height) for R24 OR Tambo Airport access road widening (6 to 8 lanes). Certified by SANRAL Gauteng region and ACSA project team. Contract SA-R24-ORT-2024.

Name: N2 Wild Coast Toll Road – Tolling Infrastructure Delivery Certificate
Description: Delivery certificate for full free-flow tolling infrastructure on N2 Wild Coast Toll Road: 6 toll gantries, back-office system, ANPR cameras, variable message signs and emergency SOS call boxes. Certified by SANRAL and KAPSCH. EC.

Name: N12 Johannesburg–Emalahleni – Annual Routine Maintenance Certificate 2024
Description: Annual routine maintenance completion certificate for 182 km N12 Johannesburg–Emalahleni. Includes pothole patching (8,400 m²), vegetation clearing (182 km), drainage clearing and signage replacement. Certified by SANRAL Gauteng/MP region.

Name: N2 Wild Coast Toll Road – International Construction Quality Audit Certificate Q4 2024
Description: International construction quality audit certificate for the N2 Wild Coast Toll Road issued by FIDIC-appointed panel (JMJ Associates). Covering concrete quality, earthworks, structural steel, waterproofing and environmental compliance. Q4 2024.

Name: SANRAL–CETA Road Construction Artisan Development Programme – Cohort 1 Certificate
Description: Completion certificate for SANRAL–CETA Road Construction Artisan Development Programme covering plant operation, roadwork quality control and surveying. 60 beneficiaries from EPWP and SMME contractors certified at NQF Level 2. Funded by SANRAL BBBEE Skills Development target.
